Alias for consumers that name the same D82 helper by storage role rather than KV tier.

## Import

```ts
import { contentAddressedStorage } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

## Signature

```ts
function contentAddressedStorage(opts: ContentAddressedStorageOptions<Ctx, V>): ContentAddressedStorage<Ctx, V>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `ContentAddressedStorageOptions<Ctx, V>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `ContentAddressedStorage<Ctx, V>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { contentAddressedStorage } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage";
```

`packages/ts/src/storage/content-addressed.ts`
